The fallout continues from the Olympic boxing fiasco that saw a biological male defeat a female competitor in under a minute, breaking her nose in the process.

While most of the world has expressed dismay and disgust, some portions of the leftist media are taking a different position on Algerian fighter Imane Khelif.

The Huffington Post and The Hollywood Reporter covered the incident with headlines about how author JK Rowling “misgendered” Khelif.

That's your headline? "Misgendered"?How bout them beating the shit outta women?

Xy is male. Believe in science.

Unbelievable.

The piece also focused on claims that Khelif is not transgender, but rather has a condition called Differences of Sexual Development (DSD). So it’s actually acceptable for him to smash in women’s faces in international fights, ok?

Vox went one further, publishing a piece about the ‘history of transgenderism’ in the Olympics and how Nazis ‘discriminated’ against trans athletes.Yes really.

Conservatives: We don’t want men punching women at the Olympics.The Media:pic.twitter.com/M6RkP94fBF

The clear insinuation is that if you express any kind of misgiving about biological men being able to compete against women in sports then you are Hitler.

The piece states “Armed with a propensity for eugenics, gender anxiety, and a startling lack of scientific evidence, a small set of Nazi officials influenced the International Olympic Committee into gender surveillance and trans panic — stuff that eerily mirrors the transphobic attacks that athletes, cis and trans alike, face today.”

Clearly this is absolute crap. There were no transgender identifying people trying to compete in the Olympics in the 1940s.

Can this Olympics get any more insane?

Yes it can actually:

As well as forcing women to fight men & mocking Christianity with a drag queen last supper opening ceremony, the Paris Olympics made triathlon competitors swim in the polluted river Seine, causing them to profusely vomit. INSANE. Dad joke intended. Report:https://t.co/uHHNL4N8EVpic.twitter.com/sUzmDEPBuh

Your support is crucial in helping us defeat mass censorship. Please consider donating viaLocalsor check out our uniquemerch. Follow us on X@ModernityNews.

Sick pervert is a guy…and a sissy. He has DSD? No, he merely has micro-penis.

Say “No” to

homo…says God.

Once Upon a Time?-Woman Abuse Was a Crime-In Some Countries!-Now Women Around The World Have a Mission To Level The Playing Field!-Take Your Revenge And No Need To Broadcast The Death Of Millions Of Male Abusers!-Most Are In The Countries Illegally And Are NON Existent=Nobody Knows Who It Is Or Where It Is!-Just Find a Deep Hole And Start The Clean Up!!-Law Enforcement Not Required and DON”T Brag About It!-No One Needs To Know And No One Cares Anyway!-MY Personal White Male Opinion!

You guys should check out more of the receipts on twitter. He doesn’t appear ever to have worn women’s clothing; he wears men’s workout clothes, men’s casual clothes, men’s suits. The media assures us that they throw transgender people, transvestites and anybody else in the gender alphabet soup off rooftops in Algeria; except, apparently, in cases where potential gold medalists are concerned.

Boycott the Olympics  all women.

You know the Olympics are increasingly irrelevant when the deranged left brings in the “Nazis”. This is the height of irony because the National Socialist government in the 1930’s brought in laws protecting Women and a little later farm animals beyond anything any other government had ever done before. I have totally boycotted from viewing these olympics and for good reasons. I hope everyone else does the same. BTW, the 1936 Berlin Olympics was the sanest of all modern olympics.

Amen!

That’s what the Soviets invented DEI for in the first place, to allow the minority to oppress the majority, in order to create division and strife to ensure they wouldn’t come together to fight the state.

You mean the joos.

Exactly right!

fools

Judaic Insanity is known to be sick beyond belief!Anybody who believes women can have penisesand men can have babies is not a HUMAN, butsomething else entirely on the scale of that whichcomes out of the south end of a pig that is facing north!I can only thank God for the Armageddon that is coming soon!When Satan and his Children are back in Hell, I’ll feel safe again!#Armageddon2024

“Judaic insanity”…..are you a blinded bigot or just another antisemite?

title: Leftist Media Reaction To Olympic Boxing Mismatch Is Unbelievable - modernity
author: Steve Watson
description: Apparently, you’re a Nazi if you don’t want to watch men beat up women
